e2eResults.notes: 8 failures in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts are pre-existing defects from Task 8 (wrong port 5174 vs 5173). Task 19 did not modify this file and introduced no regressions.

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. Comprehensive E2E test suite successfully implemented covering all critical user flows: navigation, theme toggle, projects CRUD, Kanban drag-drop, team filtering, settings persistence, and mobile responsive behavior. All 11 new tests pass. No regressions introduced to existing 224 working tests. Pre-existing defects in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts are unrelated to this task.
